label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of an entity's strategic approach or positioning

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Prediction about an entity's or technology's future viability or survival

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Documented actual outcome post-publication verified via research

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative or qualitative performance benchmark result

label: Framework Factor
definition: A factor within an analytical framework

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst or expert subjective opinion or recommendation

label: High Confidence
definition: High confidence in the data point

label: Vendor Provided
definition: Methodology: Data provided by the profiled vendor

label: Vendor Claimed
definition: Methodology: Data claimed by vendor without independent verification

label: Customer Reported
definition: Methodology: Data reported by Nortel customers in interviews

label: Industry Data
definition: Methodology: Third-party industry research or market data

label: Estimated
definition: Methodology: Estimated from available data; not directly stated
